## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and what problems are solved.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] New agent skill (added `metadata.json`, `SKILL.md`, `examples.md` inside `agents/`)
- [ ] Workflow update (added or modified files inside `workflows/` and updated `workflow-index.json`)
- [ ] Schema refinement (updated schema JSONs)
- [ ] Checklist updates
- [ ] Documentation site update
- [ ] Bug fix

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] I have ran `npm run validate` and all checks passed.
- [ ] I have ran `npm run check:links` and verified no broken internal links exist.
- [ ] I have ran `npm run build:docs` and built the documentation database files.
- [ ] If changing the visual UI, I have opened `docs/index.html` locally and checked rendering down to 390px.
- [ ] My changes preserve all existing core skill guidelines.
